name: OcasionPlus – Enriquecer (color, carrocería, puertas, plazas, cilindrada, co2, etiqueta, tracción, consumo)

parameters.query: SELECT id, url FROM moveadvisor_market_offers WHERE portal='ocasionplus' AND COALESCE(url,'')<>'' ORDER BY (displacement IS NULL) DESC, last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 150

values.name: User-Agent
values.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
